welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.subtitle: Tap below to begin your journey

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to continue your journey
auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Create one
auth.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.signInHint: Sign in with Firebase. Your password is never stored locally.
auth.signInFailed: Sign in failed. Check email and password.
auth.passwordHint: Your password is never stored locally.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: Reset email sent! Check your inbox (and spam folder) for a message from Firebase.
forgotPassword.hint: The reset link expires after 1 hour. Powered by Firebase Auth.
forgotPassword.noAccountFound: No account found with that email address.
forgotPassword.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
forgotPassword.sendFailed: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.

neuroplasticity.title: Neuroplasticity
neuroplasticity.description: Our approach rewires your brain, renews your energy, and aligns with a new rhythm of wellbeing.

higherVibration.title: Higher Vibration
higherVibration.description: Inspired by the higher vibration of gratitude, creating new pathways that lead to peace, joy, and emotional freedom.

personalGrowth.title: Personal Growth
personalGrowth.description: Strengthen self-confidence, ignite inspiration, build resilience, and create personal breakthroughs.

mindfulPresence.title: Mindful Presence
mindfulPresence.description: A calm space for presence and alignment, where you can return without pressure or expectations.

prompts.8: Do you know what you are feeling

payment.title: Unlock your Mental Alignment room
payment.subtitle: Choose a secure payment method to activate your access. You'll be redirected to a trusted checkout and brought back here automatically.
payment.paypalDescription: Use your PayPal balance, bank account, or cards. You never share your full card details with us.
payment.squareDescription: Pay securely with any major card through Square's encrypted checkout experience.
payment.footerHint: Payments are processed by PayPal or Square. We never store your full card details on this device.
payment.paypalError: Something went wrong with PayPal checkout.

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Choose a space that resonates with you
rooms.shareInviteMessage: Join me in this space in Gratitude Keeper. Tap the link below on your phone (install the app if needed):

alignment.title: Alignment Session
alignment.description: A space for presence and alignment
alignment.infoText: This is a space for inner alignment and presence. Take your time, there's no rush.
